glosses.ja: 一時停止する; 吊るす

sentences.target: Je suspends la plante près de la fenêtre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə syspɑ̃ la plɑ̃t pʁɛ də la fənɛtʁ/

translations.fr: Je suspends la plante près de la fenêtre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə syspɑ̃ la plɑ̃t pʁɛ də la fənɛtʁ/
translations.en: I'm hanging the plant near the window.
translations.es: Cuelgo la planta cerca de la ventana.
translations.de: Ich hänge die Pflanze in der Nähe des Fensters auf.
translations.it: Sto appendendo la pianta vicino alla finestra.
translations.pt: Estou pendurando a planta perto da janela.
translations.he: אני תולה את הצמח ליד החלון.
translations.vi: Tôi treo chậu cây gần cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Ik hang de plant bij het raam op.
translations.hu: A növényt az ablak közelébe akasztom.
translations.hi: मैं खिड़की के पास पौधा टांग रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κρεμάω το φυτό κοντά στο παράθυρο.
translations.nb: Jeg henger opp planten ved vinduet.
translations.id: Aku menggantung tanaman di dekat jendela.
translations.sv: Jag hänger upp växten nära fönstret.
translations.da: Jeg hænger planten op ved vinduet.
translations.ja: 窓のそばに植物を吊るしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Adverb forming a complex prepositional phrase with 'de' ('près de') to indicate proximity.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'près' ('de la fenêtre').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Ils suspendent le tableau au mur.

translations.fr: Ils suspendent le tableau au mur.
translations.en: They're hanging the painting on the wall.
translations.es: Están colgando el cuadro en la pared.
translations.de: Sie hängen das Bild an die Wand.
translations.it: Stanno appendendo il quadro al muro.
translations.pt: Eles estão pendurando o quadro na parede.
translations.he: הם תולים את התמונה על הקיר.
translations.vi: Họ đang treo bức tranh lên tường.
translations.nl: Ze hangen het schilderij aan de muur.
translations.hi: वे दीवार पर तस्वीर टांग रहे हैं.
translations.nb: De henger opp maleriet på veggen.
translations.sv: De hänger upp tavlan på väggen.
translations.da: De hænger maleriet op på væggen.
translations.ja: 彼らは壁に絵を掛けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masc. or mixed).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition (contraction of 'à' + 'le'); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Nous suspendons la guirlande sur le balcon.
sentences.reading: /nu syspɑ̃dɔ̃ la giʁlɑ̃d syʁ lə balkɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous suspendons la guirlande sur le balcon.
translations.ipa: /nu syspɑ̃dɔ̃ la giʁlɑ̃d syʁ lə balkɔ̃/
translations.en: We're hanging the garland on the balcony.
translations.es: Estamos colgando la guirnalda en el balcón.
translations.de: Wir hängen die Girlande auf dem Balkon auf.
translations.it: Stiamo appendendo la ghirlanda sul balcone.
translations.pt: Estamos pendurando a guirlanda na varanda.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang treo dây đèn ngoài ban công.
translations.nl: We hangen de slinger op het balkon op.
translations.hu: A füzért az erkélyen akasztjuk fel.
translations.hi: हम बालकनी पर लाइटों की झालर लगा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi henger opp lyslenken på balkongen.
translations.id: Kami menggantung untaian lampu di balkon.
translations.sv: Vi hänger upp girlangen på balkongen.
translations.da: Vi hænger guirlanden op på altanen.
translations.ja: 私たちはバルコニーにガーランドを飾っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On va suspendre le rideau ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va syspɑ̃dʁ lə ʁido sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On va suspendre le rideau ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va syspɑ̃dʁ lə ʁido sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We're going to hang the curtain tonight.
translations.es: Vamos a colgar la cortina esta noche.
translations.de: Wir werden heute Abend den Vorhang aufhängen.
translations.pt: Vamos pendurar a cortina hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi sẽ treo rèm.
translations.nl: We gaan vanavond het gordijn ophangen.
translations.nb: Vi skal henge opp gardinen i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kami akan memasang gorden.
translations.sv: Vi ska hänga upp gardinen i kväll.
translations.da: Vi hænger gardinet op i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜、カーテンを掛けるつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun, commonly used for 'we' in colloquial French.
Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the futur proche with the infinitive.
Infinitive verb; lexical head of the futur proche construction.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive verb.
Demonstrative determiner; forms a temporal noun phrase with 'soir' ('ce soir').
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal NP 'ce soir' functioning as a time adjunct.

app_payload.word_ja: 一時停止する; 吊るす
jp: Je suspends la plante près de la fenêtre.
Ils suspendent le tableau au mur.
Nous suspendons la guirlande sur le balcon.
On va suspendre le rideau ce soir.
fu: /ʒə syspɑ̃ la plɑ̃t pʁɛ də la fənɛtʁ/
/nu syspɑ̃dɔ̃ la giʁlɑ̃d syʁ lə balkɔ̃/
/ɔ̃ va syspɑ̃dʁ lə ʁido sə swaʁ/
fr: Je suspends la plante près de la fenêtre.
Ils suspendent le tableau au mur.
Nous suspendons la guirlande sur le balcon.
On va suspendre le rideau ce soir.
ipa: /ʒə syspɑ̃ la plɑ̃t pʁɛ də la fənɛtʁ/
/nu syspɑ̃dɔ̃ la giʁlɑ̃d syʁ lə balkɔ̃/
/ɔ̃ va syspɑ̃dʁ lə ʁido sə swaʁ/
en: I'm hanging the plant near the window.
They're hanging the painting on the wall.
We're hanging the garland on the balcony.
We're going to hang the curtain tonight.
